inputs.label: Annual Shipping Volume (units)
inputs.businessContext: Total number of units shipped per year across all modes.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total number of units shipped per year across all modes.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Tüm modlarda yılda sevk edilen toplam birim sayısı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamtzahl der pro Jahr über alle Verkehrsträger versendeten Einheiten.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre total d'unités expédiées par an tous modes confondus.

inputs.label: Average Shipment Weight (kg)
inputs.businessContext: Average weight per shipment, used to compute freight cost and risk exposure.

businessContext_i18n.en: Average weight per shipment, used to compute freight cost and risk exposure.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Sevkiyat başına ortalama ağırlık, navlun maliyeti ve risk maruziyetini hesaplamak için kullanılır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Durchschnittliches Gewicht pro Sendung, zur Berechnung von Frachtkosten und Risikoexposition.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Poids moyen par envoi, utilisé pour calculer le coût de fret et l'exposition au risque.

inputs.label: Average Distance per Shipment (km)
inputs.businessContext: Average haul distance for each shipment, influences fuel cost and transit risk.

businessContext_i18n.en: Average haul distance for each shipment, influences fuel cost and transit risk.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Her sevkiyat için ortalama taşıma mesafesi, yakıt maliyetini ve transit riskini etkiler.
businessContext_i18n.de: Durchschnittliche Transportentfernung pro Sendung, beeinflusst Treibstoffkosten und Transitrisiko.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Distance moyenne de transport pour chaque envoi, influence le coût de carburant et le risque de transit.

inputs.label: Transport Mode
inputs.businessContext: Primary mode of transport: truck, rail, ocean, air.

businessContext_i18n.en: Primary mode of transport: truck, rail, ocean, air.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Birincil taşıma modu: kamyon, tren, okyanus, hava.
businessContext_i18n.de: Primärer Verkehrsträger: LKW, Bahn, See, Luft.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Mode de transport principal : camion, rail, maritime, aérien.

inputs.label: Fuel Price (USD per liter)
inputs.businessContext: Current diesel or bunker fuel price, used for variable cost estimation.

businessContext_i18n.en: Current diesel or bunker fuel price, used for variable cost estimation.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Güncel dizel veya bunker yakıt fiyatı, değişken maliyet tahmini için kullanılır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Aktueller Diesel- oder Bunkerölpreis, zur Schätzung variabler Kosten.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Prix actuel du diesel ou du fioul lourd, utilisé pour l'estimation des coûts variables.

inputs.label: Labor Rate (USD per hour)
inputs.businessContext: Average hourly wage for drivers/operators, used in labor cost calculation.

businessContext_i18n.en: Average hourly wage for drivers/operators, used in labor cost calculation.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Sürücü/operatörler için ortalama saatlik ücret, işçilik maliyeti hesaplamasında kullanılır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Durchschnittlicher Stundenlohn für Fahrer/Betreiber, zur Berechnung der Arbeitskosten.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Salaire horaire moyen des conducteurs/opérateurs, utilisé dans le calcul du coût de main-d'œuvre.

inputs.label: Transit Time (days)
inputs.businessContext: Expected door-to-door transit time, affects inventory carrying cost and risk.

businessContext_i18n.en: Expected door-to-door transit time, affects inventory carrying cost and risk.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Beklenen kapıdan kapıya transit süresi, envanter taşıma maliyetini ve riski etkiler.
businessContext_i18n.de: Erwartete Tür-zu-Tür-Transitzeit, beeinflusst Lagerhaltungskosten und Risiko.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Temps de transit porte-à-porte prévu, affecte le coût de possession des stocks et le risque.

inputs.label: Historical Damage Rate (%)
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of shipments damaged in transit, based on historical data.

businessContext_i18n.en: Percentage of shipments damaged in transit, based on historical data.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Transit sırasında hasar gören sevkiyatların yüzdesi, geçmiş verilere dayanır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Prozentsatz der im Transit beschädigten Sendungen, basierend auf historischen Daten.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pourcentage d'envois endommagés en transit, basé sur des données historiques.

rules.message: Total annual tonnage exceeds 10,000 metric tons. Consider rail or ocean for cost efficiency.
Air freight for distances under 500 km is rarely economical. Consider truck.
High damage rate with low insurance rate indicates underinsurance. Increase coverage.
Long transit combined with high holding cost suggests high pipeline inventory cost. Evaluate mode shift.

thresholds.message: Total annual cost exceeds $500,000. Consider cost reduction strategies.
Risk-adjusted confidence below 60%. Review data quality and assumptions.
Carbon cost exceeds $10,000. Explore low-carbon alternatives.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
